reason: Agent successfully opened browser, navigated to https://example.com, and reported the page title "Example Domain"
steps: Step 1 - Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Successfully loaded the Super Agent application with sidebar showing three agents.
Step 2 - Found and clicked the "QA-20260415-183458-7inv" agent in the sidebar - Successfully opened the agent chat interface.
Step 3 - Sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." - Successfully typed and sent the message via the send button.
Step 4 - Waited for a response (agent status changed to "working") - Agent created a session "Browser Page Title Verification" and began processing the request.

Step 5 - After ~10 seconds, agent completed the task and returned response - Agent status changed back to "idle" and displayed the response: "The page title is \"Example Domain\". It's a simple page with a heading and a \"Learn more\" link."

Step 5 (verification) - Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Confirmed the response contains "Example Domain" as the page title. Screenshot captured showing the complete interaction with agent response visible.
